name: sd_c3c_gap1
drl:
rule "RJ"
when
    P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
rule "RD"
no-loop
salience -1
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    delete($p);
end
_finding: oracle alternates at salience gap 1 (ordinal not cardinal) vs engine batching — c1's regime replicated.
